title: potentilla fruticosa f. beanii
intro: Potentilla fruticosa f. beanii, also known as Dwarf Cinquefoil, is a compact shrub-like perennial plant belonging to the Rosaceae family, known for its small, five-petaled flowers. The plant contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins, which are believed to possess medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Potentilla fruticosa f. beanii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
